behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the test file path, required test description strings, and npm commands; all asserted literals are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the desired behavior and constraints without dictating exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check returncode and presence of description strings in output; alternative correct implementations would still produce these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute npm subprocess commands (test, typecheck, lint, build) rather than just grepping source.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual vitest assertions to pass, including /new presence for V1, absence for V0, and empty items while loading.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three behaviors from instruction (V1 shows /new, V0 hides /new, empty while loading) are tested, plus typecheck/lint/build.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly named with descriptive docstrings grouped by purpose (FAIL-TO-PASS vs PASS-TO-PASS).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is UI/frontend logic, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and command names appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions domain-relevant files like chat-interface.tsx only to exclude them; doesn't identify the exact buggy line.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
